name: IRON MAN
description: Armed with superior intellect and a nanotech battlesuit of his own design, Tony Stark stands alongside gods as the Invincible Iron Man. His state of the art armor turns any battlefield into his personal playground, allowing him to steal the spotlight he so desperately desires.
lore: Wounded by a weapon of his own design, billionaire inventor Tony Stark created a custom-made suit of armor to keep himself alive. Though his wounds have healed, his upgraded armor now saves the lives of countless others when Tony dons it to become the world’s greatest fighting machine—the invincible Iron Man! When the legions of the night descended upon New York City, Iron Man and his fellow Avengers turned their tower into a stronghold. From there, Tony leads the effort to unravel the mysteries of Chronovium and to reverse the Timestream Entanglement.

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact
stats.Special Mechanic 1: After firing the one-handed repulsor twice in a row, the next attack will fire two repulsors at once
stats.Special Mechanic 2: Repulsor Blast and Unibeam share the same ammo count

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

stats.Special Mechanic: Repulsor Blast and Unibeam share the same ammo count

abilities.name: Invincible Pulse Cannon
abilities.description: Fire a devastating pulse cannon in the targeted direction, delivering catastrophic damage to the targeted area upon impact

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact
stats.Special Mechanic: As the projectile travels, it creates a dispersive spell field that deals Damage Over Time to nearby enemies

abilities.name: Hyper-Velocity
abilities.description: Activate Hyper-Velocity state for swift forward flight

abilities.name: Hyper-Velocity (Armor Overdrive)
abilities.description: Activate Hyper-Velocity state for swift forward flight

abilities.name: Armor Overdrive
abilities.description: Activate Armor Overdrive state, enhancing the damage of Repulsor Blast and Unibeam

stats.Special Effect: Each KO while Armor Overdrive is active extends its duration by 2s

abilities.name: Micro-Missile Barrage
abilities.description: When Hyper-Velocity or Armor Overdrive is used, Iron Man can launch a missile bombardment

stats.Casting: Scatter-type projectile that generates a spell area upon impact
stats.Special Mechanic: Launch missiles directly beneath Iron Man

abilities.name: Micro-Missile Barrage (Armor Overdrive)
abilities.description: When Hyper-Velocity or Armor Overdrive is used, Iron Man can launch a missile bombardment

stats.Casting: Scatter-type projectile that generates a spell area upon impact
stats.Special Mechanic: Launch in the direction of Iron Man's crosshair

received.name: NANO TECH
received.description: When Iron Man, Ultron and Squirrel Girl team up, Ultron's Encephalo-Ray upgrades to Nano-Ray, firing a beam that pierces through all characters, dealing continuous damage to foes while healing allies; Squirrel Girl gains the Squirrel Missile ability. She directs a squirrel to ride Iron Man's nanotech glove as a homing missile. Upon hit, the squirrel flees just before a fiery explosion!

base.description: Upgrade Armor Overdrive to Gamma Overdrive. In this state, Iron Man gains a Gamma Shield and can fire significantly stronger Repulsor Blasts and Unibeams.

stats.Pulse Cannon Damage Falloff: Falloff starts at 0.3m, down to 40% at 5m

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Hulk, releasing Invincible Invincible Pulse Cannon generates a Gamma Shield and heavily infuses the blast, creating a Gamma Pulse Cannon. Its radiation creates a massive damage increase while the projectile flies.

base.description: Enhance Unibeam both in and out of Armor Overdrive. When fired, a ring of volatile lightning energy forms, dealing bonus damage to enemies caught near the beam's edge.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Thor, Armor Overdrive cooldown is massively reduced.
